# iosxe_monitor_session (Data Source)

This data source can read the Monitor Session configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_monitor_session" "example" {
  session_id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `session_id` (Number)

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `destination_interface` (Attributes List) SPAN destination interface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destination_interface))
- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.
- `source_interface` (Attributes List) SPAN source interface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--source_interface))

<a id="nestedatt--destination_interface"></a>
### Nested Schema for `destination_interface`

Read-Only:

- `encapsulation` (String) Set encapsulation for destination interface
- `name` (String) Interface Name


<a id="nestedatt--source_interface"></a>
### Nested Schema for `source_interface`

Read-Only:

- `direction` (String)
- `name` (String) Interface Name
